title: Policy: Remove some settings from Policy - Settings Unlocked
scenario: Policy settings removed from Cloud become unlocked and editable in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. On the Poly Cloud portal, navigate to the Policy configuration for the device. Remove one or more settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) from the Policy and apply/save the changes.
2. On the Poly Studio Mobile app, go to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
3. Verify that the settings previously locked by the policy (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) now appear unlocked and editable.
4. Tap on one of the previously policy-affected settings (e.g., ANC).
5. Attempt to change its value (e.g., toggle ANC On/Off or adjust the slider).
expected: The previously locked settings become unlocked and editable in the app. Tapping on any previously policy-affected setting allows the user to change its value successfully.
